name: vol_below_min_clamped_to_floor
description: symphony_vol (0.1) is below BREAKEVEN_ACTIVATION_MIN (0.4). dynamic_activation is clamped UP to 0.4. With current_return = 0.5 (well above activation - DEADBAND = 0.2), hold ticks increments by 1.
derivation: dynamic_activation = max(0.4, min(3.0, 0.1)) = max(0.4, 0.1) = 0.4 (clamped UP to floor). threshold = 0.4 - 0.2 = 0.2. current_return (0.5) >= 0.2 -> ticks++ -> new_hold_ticks = 0 + 1 = 1. new_hold_ticks (1) < HWM_HOLD_TICKS_THRESHOLD (5) AND not currently_breakeven_locked -> new_breakeven_locked = False. not locked -> stop_trigger_level = base_stop_level = -0.5. not triggered -> no override. Catches an impl that omitted the lower clamp (would compute activation=0.1, threshold=-0.1, still increment ticks but produce a different mid-state).
